title: Big Buck Bunny
description: A large and lovable rabbit deals with three bullying rodents who love to hurt small innocent animals. Upon becoming the target of their cruel antics, the rabbit decides to fight back.

title: Elephant Dream
description: Two strange creatures journey through a bizarre mechanical world. Proog believes in this world firmly, while Emo questions everything he sees. A short film exploring perception, reality and friendship.

title: Demon Slayer — Season 1
description: Tanjiro Kamado's entire family is slaughtered by a demon. His only surviving sister Nezuko has been turned into a demon herself. Tanjiro vows to become a demon slayer to avenge his family and restore his sister's humanity.

episodes.label: Cruelty
episodes.desc: Tanjiro returns home to a tragedy — his entire family slaughtered by a demon. His sister Nezuko is the only survivor, now turned into a demon.

episodes.label: Trainer Sakonji Urokodaki
episodes.desc: Tanjiro carries Nezuko and travels to Sagiri Mountain to find the former Water Pillar who may be able to help.

episodes.label: Sabito and Makomo
episodes.desc: During training, Tanjiro encounters spirits who teach him the secrets of the Water Breathing technique.

episodes.label: Final Selection
episodes.desc: After two years of training, Tanjiro enters the Final Selection exam where he must survive for seven days on a demon-infested mountain.

episodes.label: My Own Steel
episodes.desc: Tanjiro survives Final Selection and receives his first mission as an official Demon Slayer Corps member.

episodes.label: Swordsman Accompanying a Demon
episodes.desc: Tanjiro arrives at Kasugaoji to investigate disappearances, with Nezuko hidden in a box on his back.

title: Demon Slayer — Season 2
description: Tanjiro and his friends join the Flame Hashira Rengoku on the Mugen Train — a mission that becomes a desperate fight for survival against one of the most powerful demons they have ever faced. Then, in the Entertainment District, the battle against Upper Rank demons intensifies.

episodes.label: Flames of the Mugen Train
episodes.desc: Tanjiro, Zenitsu and Inosuke board the Mugen Train with Flame Hashira Kyojuro Rengoku to investigate the mysterious disappearance of passengers.

episodes.label: Deep Sleep
episodes.desc: Everyone on the train is put into a deep sleep by a demon's Blood Demon Art. Tanjiro must find a way to wake everyone up before it's too late.

episodes.label: Akaza
episodes.desc: The Upper Rank Three demon Akaza appears and engages Rengoku in an intense battle that pushes the Flame Hashira to his absolute limits.

episodes.label: Sound Hashira — Tengen Uzui
episodes.desc: Recovering from the Mugen Train mission, Tanjiro and friends are assigned to the Entertainment District with the flashy Sound Hashira Tengen Uzui.

episodes.label: Infiltrating the Entertainment District
episodes.desc: Tanjiro, Zenitsu and Inosuke disguise themselves to infiltrate the Entertainment District and search for the demon hiding within.

episodes.label: Daki
episodes.desc: An Upper Rank demon named Daki reveals herself in the Entertainment District. Her power is unlike anything the group has faced before.

episodes.label: Transformation
episodes.desc: Tanjiro's rage unlocks something terrifying within him. Nezuko's demon powers also transform in a shocking and unexpected way.

title: Attack on Titan — Season 1
description: Humanity lives inside cities surrounded by enormous walls protecting them from Titans — gigantic humanoids who devour humans. When the walls are breached, young Eren Yeager vows to exterminate every last Titan.

episodes.label: To You, 2000 Years From Now
episodes.desc: The Colossal Titan breaches the outermost wall. Eren watches in horror as his mother is devoured. He swears to kill every Titan alive.

episodes.label: That Day: The Fall of Shiganshina
episodes.desc: Survivors flee behind Wall Rose. Eren, Mikasa and Armin struggle to survive in refugee camps, haunted by what they witnessed.

episodes.label: A Dim Light Amid Despair
episodes.desc: Eren, Mikasa and Armin join the military training corps, beginning five years of brutal training to fight Titans.

episodes.label: The Night of the Closing Ceremony
episodes.desc: Graduation day arrives. The top ten cadets choose between Survey Corps, Military Police and Garrison. Eren chooses the Survey Corps.

episodes.label: First Battle: The Struggle for Trost
episodes.desc: The Colossal Titan appears again and breaches Wall Rose at Trost District. Eren and his fellow trainees fight for their lives.

title: Attack on Titan — Season 2
description: A Titan is spotted inside Wall Rose — meaning the wall may already be breached. As the Survey Corps investigates, shocking truths begin to surface about the Titans, the walls, and the people Eren trusted most.

episodes.label: Beast Titan
episodes.desc: A mysterious Titan with the ability to speak is spotted outside the walls. The Survey Corps discovers Titans inside Wall Rose.

episodes.label: I'm Home
episodes.desc: As the Garrison troops seek refuge in a castle, the Survey Corps learns a terrifying secret about how Titans are created.

episodes.label: Southwestward
episodes.desc: The group trapped in the castle faces an overwhelming Titan siege. Hange Zoë reveals new discoveries about Titan anatomy.

episodes.label: Soldier
episodes.desc: A shocking revelation about the identity of the Armored and Colossal Titans sends the Survey Corps into chaos and despair.

episodes.label: Historia
episodes.desc: The truth about Historia Reiss and her true identity is revealed. Ymir's past and her connection to the Titans comes to light.

episodes.label: Warrior
episodes.desc: Reiner and Bertholdt reveal themselves as the Armored and Colossal Titans and kidnap Eren. A desperate rescue mission begins.
